title: GD mod
description:
a mod that adds geometry dash!
and also youtubers (sorry for translations)
authors: cheshet, MadTT
body:
# **GD mod: A Unique Adventure Awaits!**  

**GD mod** is an exciting and expansive Minecraft modification that adds a wealth of fresh content. Whether you're an explorer or a creative builder, this mod offers something special for everyone.  

## **What Does GD mod Add?**

### **Powerful Tools & Equipment**
- **Drills & Advanced Tools** – Mine faster with new pickaxes and get resources from the drills.
- **New Ores** - Discover 3 new ores to craft new and stronger gear.
- **Cubes from geometry dash** – Craft unique cubes in cube constructor that provide special abilities (try to collect them all to get flying ability).

### **Structures, Dungeons & Bosses**
- **New Structures** – Find useful structures like shops that use orbs to buy from them (more on orbs later in description) shops are generating in plains and forests. New structures in the new derd biome that have loot.
- **Challenging Dungeons** – Explore mysterious dungeons filled with traps, treasures, and dangers.  
- **New Epic Boss** – Test your skills against  new boss with unique mechanics.

### **New Dimensions**
Venture beyond the Overworld into **two new dimensions**, each with its own atmosphere, creatures, and resources to discover (portals made of bedrock and only accessible through the dungeon underground.

### **Geometry Dash Inspired Blocks**
A fun crossover! GD Mod introduces **blocks and decorative elements inspired by Geometry Dash**, adding a new touch to your builds.

### **Fun In Multiplayer**
With addition of **new currency**, orbs, you can now pay someone with them (to withdraw them use /sell, to check your balance use /orbs), and diamonds no longer needed to buy something.

## **Why Should I Try GD mod?**
- **Endless Exploration** – Uncover secrets in dungeons, conquer bosses, and travel to strange new worlds.  
- **New Blocks** – Mix Minecraft’s classic style with Geometry Dash’s blocks for unique designs (try to build your layout).  
- **Progression & Challenge** – Upgrade your gear, master new mechanics, and take on hard boss battle.

GD mod isn’t just another mod about grind—it’s an **immersive experience** that keeps you engaged with its new things and creativity.
